function.name: music.generate
function.description: Generate music using ACE-Step AI music generation

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the music to generate (lyrics, mood, instruments)

style.description: Musical style or genre (e.g., 'rock', 'jazz', 'electronic', 'orchestral', 'lo-fi hip hop')

tempo.description: Tempo in BPM (default: auto-detected from style)

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility (-1 for random)

output_path.description: Output file path for generated audio

function.name: music.list_styles
function.description: List all available music generation styles and genres supported by ACE-Step
